title: papuacalia glossophylla
intro: Papuacalia glossophylla, also known as the 'Papuan calalia', is a flowering plant species in the family Goodeniaceae, native to New Guinea. The Papuacalia glossophylla is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Papuacalia glossophylla include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in water for its medicinal purposes.
